classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 该表格明确列出6针信号连接器的引脚编号（PIN 1-6）、信号功能（VCC+5V、GND、VB、电池GND、485+、485-）及线色（红、黑、棕、白、蓝、黄），完全符合反馈器/信号接口的针脚定义特征。包含电源脚（VCC、GND）和通信信号脚（485+/485-），属于典型的反馈线 pinout 表。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标图像展示了 SC-06 连接器的针脚布局示意图，包含 6 个引脚的编号（1-6）排列和连接器物理外形。从全图上下文可见，SC-06 对应反馈线（Feedback Wire）接口，其针脚定义包括 VCC=5V、GND、VB、UG/GND、485+、485- 等信号功能和颜色标注，符合反馈器/传感器信号连接器的针脚定义特征。

drawing_metadata.authority_rule: IMAGE 1 only for visible text and coordinates; IMAGE 2 context only

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly as shown in IMAGE 1.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No explicit unit shown in this connector pinout detail; do not assume dimensional units for pin labels.
terminology_rules: Use 'Connector detail' and 'pin designation' for this view.
Do not convert pin numbers into dimensions.
Keep connector model text exactly as visible.

mounting_interface.zh: 该区域未显示安装尺寸，仅为SC-06连接器针位示意。
mounting_interface.en: This region shows only the SC-06 connector pinout schematic and no mounting dimensions.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该区域未涉及轴或键槽接口数据。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft or key interface data is present in this region.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 该区域不是外形尺寸视图，未标注包络尺寸或间隙要求。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: This is not an overall envelope view; no envelope or clearance dimensions are shown.

connector_considerations.zh: 可确认连接器型号为SC-06，并可识别6个针位编号的相对位置。
connector_considerations.en: The connector designation is SC-06, and the relative positions of the six pin numbers are visible.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 未显示针脚功能、电气定义、线色或任何尺寸数值；这些信息只能从上下文整图理解，不能作为本区域直接标注返回。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Pin functions, electrical assignments, wire colors, and any dimensional values are not shown directly in this crop and therefore are not returned as direct annotations.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 该裁剪图未直接显示各针脚功能定义。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Pin function assignments are not directly visible in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 该裁剪图未直接显示线色或电气信号名称。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Wire colors and electrical signal names are not directly visible in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 连接器轮廓仅为示意，未提供可作为尺寸记录的数值标注。
unresolved_items.issue_en: The connector outline is schematic only and includes no direct dimensional callouts.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。必须体现针脚功能、线序、线色、接线关系或接口定义；仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向或连接器安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 图中明确展示了电机动力线的引脚编号（1-4）、针脚功能（U相/V相/W相/接地 MOTOR U/V/W/PE）、线色（黄/红/黑/黄绿）和线径（20AWG），完整体现了动力接口的针脚分配、相线定义、接地保护和接线关系，符合动力连接器 pinout 定义表的典型特征。

classification.reason: 该图展示了电机轴及连接器的机械安装尺寸，包括轴径Φ50、轴长144±1.5、键槽CM5L15及其尺寸、形位公差Φ0.04A和0.02、连接器Housing（H66L6-02P、H66L6-04P）及Terminal型号（T66L6-B）、连接器安装位置尺寸（16、5、30±1等）、Power Wire长度L≥500等物理安装信息。图中仅标注连接器型号、端子型号和线束走向，未体现针脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，符合mechanical_dimensions类别的判定标准。

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly in text_annotations and original_callout.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume mm for mechanical dimensions unless otherwise shown; keep non-dimensional connector model text unitless.
terminology_rules: Classify connector and cable notes under Connector / Cable Interface.
Classify shaft, key, thread, diameters and runout under Shaft Interface or Key / Keyway.
Treat datum-feature and geometric tolerance frames as Functional Annotation unless directly tied to a dimensioned interface.

mounting_interface.en: No clear mounting hole pattern or flange mounting dimensions are visible in this crop; only body outline and some datum/geometric tolerance annotations are shown.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 可见输出轴直径Φ16带上偏差0、下偏差-0.13，配合段直径Φ44带0/-0.011，前端相关直径Φ50带0/-0.016；键尺寸示意为16×5，轴向长度含30±1、6和3，并有CM5L15与KEY标注。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: Visible shaft interface data include output shaft diameter Φ16 with tolerance 0/-0.13, a pilot or shoulder diameter Φ44 with 0/-0.011, and a front related diameter Φ50 with 0/-0.016. The key detail shows 16×5, with axial dimensions including 30±1, 6, and 3, plus visible callouts CM5L15 and KEY.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 可见机身总长144±1.5，顶部线缆/连接器引出，整体高度方向标注72.5。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: Visible overall envelope data include body length 144±1.5, top-exit cables/connectors, and an overall height direction dimension of 72.5.

connector_considerations.zh: 可见两组连接器/线束说明：Housing:H66L6-02P、Terminal:T66L6-B；Housing:H66L6-04P、Terminal:T66L6-B；以及SC-06与Power Wire L≥500。
connector_considerations.en: Two connector/wire notes are visible: Housing:H66L6-02P with Terminal:T66L6-B, Housing:H66L6-04P with Terminal:T66L6-B, plus SC-06 and Power Wire L≥500.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图展示了电机端面的机械结构，包含法兰外形、安装孔位置（4-Φ5.5）、孔距尺寸（Φ70±0.1）、连接器物理位置（SM-6P、Brake Wire、Feedback Wire）及线缆长度要求（L≥500），属于典型的机械外形尺寸和安装定位图纸。虽然标注了Brake Wire和Feedback Wire，但仅体现连接器型号、线束走向和安装位置，未展示针脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表等电气接口定义内容。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Rightmost letters touch the image boundary; box is clipped to the visible glyphs in frame.
Text is rotated inside the connector housing; exact angle is approximate but clearly diagonal.

drawing_metadata.source_authority: IMAGE 1 only for text and coordinates; IMAGE 2 for context only

language_processing_rules.audit_language: Chinese source text preserved exactly in original callouts; audit notes remain bilingual where useful.
language_processing_rules.frontend_language: English mechanical terminology normalized for engineering use.
language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Keep visible text exactly as drawn, including symbols, tolerances, and spacing.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume millimeters for visible mechanical dimensions unless explicitly stated otherwise.
terminology_rules: Prefer overall envelope, mounting interface, connector / cable interface, and reference dimension labels.
Preserve diameter and angle symbols exactly.
Treat L≥500 as a minimum cable length callout.

dimension_records.ambiguity_notes: Connector model/series marking; exact mating specification not confirmed from crop.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square flange mounting interface, □60, with 4-Φ5.5 mounting holes and a reference diameter callout Φ70±0.1.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Central shaft/front pilot region is visible, but only the front pilot diameter reference Φ70±0.1 is directly called out in this crop; no key dimensions are visible here.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible envelope is approximately square at 60 mm nominal across the mounting face; 45° angular note appears tied to the mounting / hole arrangement context.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Upper cable/connector bundle includes Brake Wire, Feedback Wire, and SM-6P connector markings; both wire groups carry L≥500 minimum length callouts.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No explicit shaft diameter, shaft extension length, thread, or keyway dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.item: No additional shaft, keyway, thread, or rear connector dimensions are directly legible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.reason: Not visible or not sufficiently legible in the authoritative crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 本图为电机技术参数表，包含额定功率、额定转矩、额定转速、电流、电阻、电感、时间常数、转动惯量、最大径向力/轴向力、反馈装置型号、绝缘等级、防护等级、重量等规格参数。虽然主要内容为电气和机械性能参数，但包含转动惯量、最大径向力、最大轴向力、重量、反馈装置型号、防护等级等与电机机械结构、物理安装相关的尺寸性能信息，并且该表是产品技术规格的整体说明而非针脚接线图或性能曲线图，因此归入机械尺寸类别最为合适。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 该图是典型的扭矩-转速性能曲线图，包含明确的坐标轴（纵轴T(Nm)表示扭矩，横轴n(rpm)表示转速）、两条特征曲线（Intermittent间歇区和Continuous连续区）、标注的扭矩数值（3.81、1.4、1.27Nm）以及转速范围（0-5000rpm），完全符合电机性能曲线类图纸的典型特征。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Bottom label appears as 'n (rpm)' with a visible space before the parenthesis; box covers the glyphs only.
This is the x-axis origin label, distinct from the y-axis '0'.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible text exactly from IMAGE 1; do not infer hidden or context-only text from IMAGE 2.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume mm only for mechanical dimensions; chart axes keep printed units.
terminology_rules: Use standard mechanical terms for chart and dimension records.
Keep original Chinese only when visible; otherwise use English engineering terms.
ambiguous_terms: N.m vs N·m notation is visually printed as N.m in IMAGE 1.
1.27 and 1.4 are chart callouts, not standalone dimensions.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector or cable interface information is visible in the target crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Target crop contains only a performance curve with labels and numeric callouts; no mechanical dimensions are directly visible.

unresolved_items.item: No direct mechanical dimensions visible in IMAGE 1; only performance curve annotations are present.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图显示一般公差参考表，包含 GB/T 1804-m 国标公差等级、线性尺寸范围与对应公差值（如 ≤6 为 ±0.1、>6~30 为 ±0.2），属于机械图纸中的尺寸公差标注说明，符合 mechanical_dimensions 类别中公差部分的定义。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
